scenario: A summary block records ruled-out paths; the continuation lands the conclusion.
question: What did we determine was slowing down checkout?
turns: [summary of earlier work] We profiled checkout. Ruled out: the payment gateway (consistently <200ms) and template rendering (<50ms). Still investigating the cart total calculation.
Confirmed: the cart total recomputes every line item's tax on each render in an N+1 loop. Memoizing the tax lookup drops p95 to ~600ms. That was the bottleneck.
